sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH db2_data AS (
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD <> '@{variables('Source')}'
       and TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Target')}'
    UNION
    select SUBJ_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD
    from @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC
    where CYC_STTUS_CD = 'RUNNING'
       and SUBJ_CD = '@{variables('Subject')}'
       and SRC_SYS_CD = '@{variables('Source')}'
),
transformed_data AS (
    SELECT SUBJ_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD
    FROM db2_data
)
SELECT COUNT(*) as link_count FROM transformed_data

parameters.subject: EdgeServer Abort  @pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWDB
parameters.body:
The EdgeServer job cannot run because another process is running

Source    = EDW
Target    = EDGE
Subject   = CLAIMS
Frequency = MONTHLY

parameters.subject: Risk Adjustment Year is empty
parameters.body: Enrollment Control Job aborted because the Risk Adjustment year is empty. Please correct and re-run the job.
